frontmatter.title: Claude Code Skills Not Found After npx Install
frontmatter.subtitle: Why installed skills disappear and the SessionStart hook that fixes it permanently
frontmatter.description: npx skill install drops skills into ~/.agents/skills/ but Claude Code reads ~/.claude/skills/. Here are two fixes: a manual symlink and an auto-sync SessionStart hook.
frontmatter.author: Layer5 Team
